hierarchy.description: text-sm font-body leading-relaxed border-l-2 border-zinc-700 pl-4

typography.installation: Ensure Anton and IBM Plex Mono are imported from Google Fonts.

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind default scale, utilizing generous padding (p-6, p-8) within tight grids to create breathing room over pure black.

dashboard_structure.left_panel: col-span-1 md:col-span-8 flex flex-col border-r border-zinc-800 min-h-[60vh] bg-black relative
dashboard_structure.right_panel: col-span-1 md:col-span-4 flex flex-col bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800

buttons.primary_action: w-full h-24 text-3xl font-heading uppercase tracking-widest transition-colors duration-100 flex items-center justify-center gap-4 rounded-none border-none

tags.chip: px-3 py-1 bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-700 text-xs text-zinc-300 font-body uppercase rounded-none hover:bg-zinc-800 hover:text-white transition-colors

cards.base: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded-none p-6 shadow-none
cards.header: text-xs font-body tracking-[0.2em] text-zinc-500 mb-4 border-b border-zinc-800 pb-2

mockup_viewer.container: relative w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-black overflow-hidden
mockup_viewer.placeholder_front: absolute top-1/4 left-1/3 w-16 h-16 border border-dashed border-zinc-600 flex items-center justify-center text-zinc-600 text-[10px] font-body
mockup_viewer.placeholder_back: absolute inset-16 border border-dashed border-zinc-600 flex items-center justify-center text-zinc-600 text-sm font-body

counter.wrapper: flex gap-6 items-center px-6 py-4 border-b border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-950
counter.label: text-[10px] text-zinc-500 font-body uppercase tracking-widest

motion.philosophy: Brutalist and mechanical. Snappy transitions with hard cuts. No soft easings.

icons.style: weight='fill' or weight='bold' for stark industrial look

media.usage: Use 'dark_grunge' as a very low-opacity fixed background overlay (mix-blend-overlay or opacity-5) over the right panel or loading states to give the app a physical zine/print-shop grain.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly avoid any border-radius. All elements MUST be rounded-none.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serifs. Integrate 'Anton' for headings and 'IBM Plex Mono' for all data, descriptions, and UI text.
The layout should feel like an asymmetric terminal. The left side (Mockup Viewer) must be pure #000000 background to represent the black t-shirt, allowing stark white graphics to pop.
Use Phosphor icons. Install via: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react.
The 'THE GRIND' description block should be distinct, perhaps using a left-border treatment with mono typography.
Approve/Deny buttons must be massive, taking up the full bottom span of the viewport or standard grid, resembling heavy machinery triggers.
Apply the noise/grunge textures at a low opacity to the backgrounds of panels (excluding the pure black mockup viewer) to enforce the print shop aesthetic.
